description: Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) emerged in 2024 on Solana as an absurd, chaotic meme token driven by crude humor and viral internet culture. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 FARTCOIN gives original Fartcoin holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, full AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Fartcoin
